differential_diagnoses: Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Anemia of chronic disease or occult gastrointestinal bleeding
Chronotropic incompetence (in the context of known conduction system disease/atrial history)
Restrictive lung disease secondary to prior granulomatosis with polyangiitis
next_steps: Perform comprehensive transthoracic echocardiography to assess aortic valve hemodynamics and LV structure/function
Obtain laboratory evaluation including CBC, iron studies, TSH, and NT-proBNP
Referral for heart valve team consultation for TAVR evaluation
Assess for occult GI bleeding via fecal immunochemical testing
Obtain formal pulmonary function testing to rule out restrictive lung disease
Review symptom progression and confirm lack of exertional syncope or presyncope
